book_summary: 2 Timothy 1-4 has full chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layers. The book preserves sincere trust through Lois and Eunice, gift rekindled in power/love/soundness, the beautiful deposit guarded by Spirit, entrusted teaching, straight handling of truth, predatory teaching safeguards, Divine-breathed Scripture equipping beautiful work, and the final charge given with patience and mercy.
translation_notes: Pastoral Epistles require source/authorship/reception-history second-pass audit.
Women-household exploitation passage in 3:6-7 is predatory-teacher critique, not a stereotype of women.
Scripture is Divine-breathed to equip beautiful/good work, not to weaponize prooftexts.
source_witness_audit_flags: Pastoral Epistles authorship/source-setting metadata needed in second pass.
2 Timothy 3:16 theopneustos and scope of graphe should be reviewed in source-witness audit.
next_actions: Continue Batch A with Titus and Philemon.
